nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: Sole reliance on traditional sketchbook methods
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me brainstorm ideas and help me get through the bottleneck of creativity

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I also use AI for email responses, and am starting to try to implement automation for this

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: Passive acceptance of AI ideas without understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I always try to assess and understand why the ideas work, and I see this as a learning process

nodes.label: Trust in AI for client communication
nodes.label_negative: Distrust in AI for personal client emails
nodes.grounding_span: as my trust in AI has grown, I've started to use AI generated responses more and more

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: I am currently creating a HTML app through AI that I can use in my browser which will track my hours

nodes.label: Creative productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI takes a lot of the burden away, and ultimately helps me deliver the best possible outcome I can to my clients

nodes.label: Personal creative skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I always try to assess and understand why the ideas work, and I see this as a learning process, which, if anything, will improve my creativity

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I see this saving lots of time and allowing me to focus more on the design side of things

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for marketing research
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to help me write my business plan, and this made the whole process so much simpler and quicker, and the final business plan that I had was really high quality. This was very satisfying indeed.

nodes.label: Optimism about expanding AI use in accounting
nodes.grounding_span: I'm starting to consider using AI to streamline this too

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I very much look forward to continuing to learn and collaborate with AI in the future

nodes.label: Iterative task expansion — gradually increasing AI's role
nodes.grounding_span: Learning about what can be achieved, and implementing it as I go, so as to maximise my efficiency

nodes.label: Reflective learning from AI output — adapts AI suggestions into own skills
nodes.grounding_span: I always try to assess and understand why the ideas work, and I see this as a learning process
